---
title: "flight_delays"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-13"
---

```{r}
# Load data
data <- read.csv("sample_600k.csv")

# Create ROUTE feature
data$ROUTE <- paste(data$ORIGIN, data$DEST, sep = "_")

# Bin departure hour into categories
data$DEP_HOUR <- cut(
  as.numeric(as.character(data$DEP_HOUR)),
  breaks = c(0, 6, 12, 18, 24),
  labels = c("night", "morning", "afternoon", "evening"),
  include.lowest = TRUE
)

# Convert to factors
cols <- c("MONTH","DAY_OF_MONTH","DAY_OF_WEEK","OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER",
          "ORIGIN","DEST","DEP_DEL15","DEP_HOUR","ROUTE")

data[cols] <- lapply(data[cols], as.factor)

# Discretize distance
data$DISTANCE <- cut(data$DISTANCE, breaks = 5)
data$DISTANCE <- as.factor(data$DISTANCE)

# Split target
target <- "DEP_DEL15"
features <- setdiff(names(data), target)

# Compute prior P(Y)
prior <- prop.table(table(data[[target]]))

# Compute likelihood tables P(X | Y)
likelihoods <- list()

for (feature in features) {
  likelihoods[[feature]] <- table(data[[feature]], data[[target]])
  
  # Convert to conditional probabilities
  likelihoods[[feature]] <- (likelihoods[[feature]] + 1) # Laplace smoothing
  likelihoods[[feature]] <- prop.table(likelihoods[[feature]], margin=2)
}
```

``` {r}
predict_nb <- function(row, prior, likelihoods, features) {
  classes <- names(prior)
  probs <- c()
  
  for (y in classes) {
    prob <- prior[y]
    
    for (feature in features) {
      val <- as.character(row[[feature]])
      
      # Handle unseen values
      if (val %in% rownames(likelihoods[[feature]])) {
        prob <- prob * likelihoods[[feature]][val, y]
      } else {
        prob <- prob * 1e-6
      }
    }
    
    probs[y] <- prob
  }
  
  return(names(which.max(probs)))
}
```

```{r}
predictions <- apply(data, 1, function(row) {
  predict_nb(as.list(row), prior, likelihoods, features)
})

# Accuracy
accuracy <- mean(predictions == data$DEP_DEL15)
accuracy
```
